summary: Both backend (23/23) and frontend tests pass for Coin Connect's pink/coral UI rebuild. New endpoints /api/explore (6 profiles + online_count) and /api/auth/google-session (401 for invalid session_id) verified. All previously passing endpoints still work. Frontend: login screen renders flame logo + 'Coin Connect' + Google button + agree checkbox + More options link; More options logs in as smoke@test.com and lands on /(tabs)/match; Match shows pulsing rings, avatar, 'Tap Start to find a match', '10 coins/min', pink Start button and 4-tab bottom nav (globe / center play / chat / person); Explore shows 6 profile cards with pink call buttons and coin pill; Chat shows 'Messages' + 4 rows; Profile shows pink hero with BOY badge, 3 stats, Get VIP, App language, Camera beauty toggle, Privacy/Terms/Community, Sign out; coins pill on Match and Explore navigates to /store; Buy navigates to /checkout.

react_native_issues.issue: On Expo web preview, the checkout shows 'React Native WebView does not support this platform.' This is a known react-native-webview limitation on web; the Razorpay flow will work on iOS/Android device. Not a regression — flagged informationally.

critical_code_review_comments: checkout.tsx: WebView is unsupported on web; consider a web fallback (Razorpay Checkout JS) so the web preview is also testable end-to-end. Mobile is unaffected.

google-session: invalid session correctly returns 401 from Emergent provider. Make sure frontend Continue with Google flow handles redirect+session_id exchange (not testable here as it requires real OAuth).
tabs (_layout.tsx): Tab buttons are Expo Router defaults without testIDs. For more robust automation, consider tabBarTestIDProps via Tabs.Screen options.tabBarButtonTestID.
server.py: end_call still uses raw dict instead of Pydantic SpendCoinsIn (carried over from previous iteration).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests register TEST_<uuid>@example.com users for isolation. Frontend uses smoke@test.com/pass1234 via 'More options' button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tabs use Expo Router default Tabs (no testIDs on tab buttons themselves) — navigate via URL (/explore, /chat, /profile, /match) or click the underlying anchor. Key testIDs: more-options-btn, start-match-btn, match-coins-pill, match-avatar, match-title, online-count, explore-title, explore-coins-pill, explore-card-{id}, store-title, store-balance, pack-{id}, profile-title, profile-hero, vip-btn, stat-coins, stat-credits, stat-history, row-language, row-beauty, row-privacy, row-terms, row-community, logout-btn. Razorpay checkout WebView only renders on iOS/Android, not web preview. Google login flow does external redirect — do not click 'Continue with Google' in automation; use 'More options' for demo login.
